IT-Turnitin – Academic Integrity and Plagiarism Detection System

What It Provides?

Similarity Report:

Shows source matches and percentages.

AI Writing Report:

Provides additional analysis regarding the probability of the text being written by artificial intelligence.

LMS Integration:

Works directly with KHAS Learn assignments.

Who Uses It?

Students:

Upload their work, review similarity reports.

Academic Staff:

Manage assignment settings, interpret reports, and provide feedback.

KHAS Learn Integrations (Plagiarism Plugin)

Assignment (Turnitin Assignment 2)

Standard assignment uploads are matched with Turnitin, and the report is viewed via the LMS.

Texts can be checked when the plugin is enabled for long answer/essay type exam questions.

Forum Posts

When the plugin is enabled in course forums, responses can be sent to Turnitin for similarity analysis.

These integrations are enabled on a course basis by the

instructor

; results are visible within KHAS Learn.

Interpreting Reports

Similarity score

alone does not mean plagiarism; the type and context of matches must be considered.

Bibliography and correctly marked citations may increase the score; this is normal.

AI Writing Report

provides an additional view to assist the instructor's assessment.

Usage Tips

Upload

text-based files

(DOCX / text-based PDF-OCR).

Enclose direct quotes in

quotation marks

, cite the

source

.

Upload

your own work

; using someone else's file is an academic violation.

Support

MyKHAS Tickets (Create Request)

Edge

or

.

File Format:

Text-based

PDF

,

DOCX

,

PPTX

,

TXT

(OCR instead of scan).

Access:

KHAS Learn → Related course → Turnitin Assignment (Assignment 2). Applications for

Turnitin.com

for non-assignment scans such as articles/theses are handled through the

Information Center

.

Frequently Asked Questions

My similarity score is high; is this plagiarism?

The score alone is not sufficient. The type of matches must be examined; bibliography and correctly marked citations can increase the score.

When does the report appear?

Usually within a short time for the first upload; re-uploads may take up to 24 hours.

I uploaded a PDF but text is not detected. What should I do?

Scanned PDFs are not detected. Resave the file as a

text-based PDF

or

DOCX

.

What is the difference between Turnitin Assignment 2 and turnitin.com?

Turnitin Assignment 2 in KHAS Learn

is assignment-based; uploading and viewing reports happen within the LMS.

Turnitin.com

is used for non-assignment independent works (articles, theses, etc.) and the process is conducted with

Information Center

support.

Why are my forum and quiz posts going to Turnitin?

The course

instructor

may have enabled the Turnitin plugin for forum posts and/or long quiz answers. 
                      In this case, relevant texts are sent for similarity check and results are viewed via KHAS Learn.

What is the AI Writing Report?

Turnitin can generate an

AI Writing Report

for certain uploaded documents. 
                      This report provides additional analysis regarding the probability of the text being written by artificial intelligence and assists

instructors

in their assessment.
